content.question: How transferable is the 2025 Budapest merger-reversal precedent to rural village contexts, and what threshold of local mobilization (petition signatures, protest size, media coverage) is sufficient to trigger KLIK reversal in a depopulated village?
content.reduction_path: Analyze KLIK reversal decisions post-2023 across rural cases; quantify relationship between local protest scale and reversal likelihood; conduct interviews with district-level KLIK administrators on decision-reversal criteria.
